        "><div class="flex flex-col w-full justify-center items-center undefined"><div class="splide" aria-label="We Are Huntress"><div class="splide__track"><ul class="splide__list"><li class="splide__slide"><div class="positioning-card" style="cursor:pointer"><div class="positioning-card-subject-wrapper"><div class="positioning-card-subject">BUSINESS EMAIL COMPROMISE</div></div><div><h2 class="positioning-card-heading"><p>51% of </p><p>customers</p></h2><h3 class="positioning-card-subheading"><p>experience an attack</p></h3></div><div class="positioning-card-description"><p>With $6.3B+ stolen globally in 2024, email compromise is big business for shady hackers. Our defense-in-depth approach covers every angle: endpoint monitoring, identity protection, educating your end users, and email security that actually <em>works.</em></p></div><div class="positioning-card-cta"><a class="persistent-link _navigationLink_1eyvn_54 _large_1eyvn_119" aria-label="Learn more about BEC" role="button" href="/use-cases/business-email-compromise" target="_self" data-discover="true"><span class="_linkText_1eyvn_164">Learn more about BEC</span><img data-image-zoomable="false" role="presentation" aria-hidden="true" src="https://cdn.builder.io/api/v1/image/assets%2F3eb6f92aedf74f109c7b4b0897ec39a8%2F779e332a141048329fb98c924119138a" srcSet="" alt="right arrow" class="builder-image _iconArrowRight_1eyvn_85" loading="lazy" fetchPriority="auto" decoding="async" crossorigin="anonymous"/></a></div></div></li><li class="splide__slide"><div class="positioning-card" style="cursor:pointer"><div class="positioning-card-subject-wrapper"><div class="positioning-card-subject">RANSOMWARE</div></div><div><h2 class="positioning-card-heading"><p>17-Hour</p><p>Average</p></h2><h3 class="positioning-card-subheading"><p>time-to-ransom</p></h3></div><div class="positioning-card-description"><p>Every second counts when attackers move through your network. Ransomware isn&#x27;t a single event; it&#x27;s around 18 separate actions building toward disruption, and you have less than 1 business day to react. Huntress catches ransomware gangs and shuts them down before they wreak havoc on your business.</p></div><div class="positioning-card-cta"><a class="persistent-link _navigationLink_1eyvn_54 _large_1eyvn_119" aria-label="Learn more about Ransomware" role="button" href="/use-cases/ransomware" target="_self" data-discover="true"><span class="_linkText_1eyvn_164">Learn more about Ransomware</span><img data-image-zoomable="false" role="presentation" aria-hidden="true" src="https://cdn.builder.io/api/v1/image/assets%2F3eb6f92aedf74f109c7b4b0897ec39a8%2F779e332a141048329fb98c924119138a" srcSet="" alt="right arrow" class="builder-image _iconArrowRight_1eyvn_85" loading="lazy" fetchPriority="auto" decoding="async" crossorigin="anonymous"/></a></div></div></li><li class="splide__slide"><div class="positioning-card" style="cursor:pointer"><div class="positioning-card-subject-wrapper"><div class="positioning-card-subject">ADVERSARY-IN-THE-MIDDLE</div></div><div><h2 class="positioning-card-heading"><p>50%</p><p>increase</p></h2><h3 class="positioning-card-subheading"><p>YoY in AiTM attacks</p></h3></div><div class="positioning-card-description"><p>Adversary-in-the-Middle (AiTM) attacks jumped WAY up this year because hackers found a way to slip past MFAs. They intercept your authentication in real time, swiping session tokens when you think you&#x27;re safe. Our identity-level visibility spots compromised sessions instantly and takes action before damage is done.</p></div><div class="positioning-card-cta"><a class="persistent-link _navigationLink_1eyvn_54 _large_1eyvn_119" aria-label="Learn more about AiTM" role="button" href="/cybersecurity-101/topic/adversary-in-the-middle-attack" target="_self" data-discover="true"><span class="_linkText_1eyvn_164">Learn more about AiTM</span><img data-image-zoomable="false" role="presentation" aria-hidden="true" src="https://cdn.builder.io/api/v1/image/assets%2F3eb6f92aedf74f109c7b4b0897ec39a8%2F779e332a141048329fb98c924119138a" srcSet="" alt="right arrow" class="builder-image _iconArrowRight_1eyvn_85" loading="lazy" fetchPriority="auto" decoding="async" crossorigin="anonymous"/></a></div></div></li><li class="splide__slide"><div class="positioning-card" style="cursor:pointer"><div class="positioning-card-subject-wrapper"><div class="positioning-card-subject">PHISHING</div></div><div><h2 class="positioning-card-heading"><p>31% of Security </p><p>incidents</p></h2><h3 class="positioning-card-subheading"><p>Involve phishing</p></h3></div><div class="positioning-card-description"><p>Human risk management is a major concern for ALL businesses now, but your people can be your first layer of defense. function get6senseData() {
  const sixSenseRaw = localStorage.getItem("_6senseCompanyDetails");
  if (sixSenseRaw) {
    try {
      return JSON.parse(sixSenseRaw);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Error parsing 6sense data:", error);
      return null;
    }
  }
  return null;
}

// Poll for data if not immediately available (e.g., 6sense loads async)
function pollFor6senseData(callback, maxAttempts = 10, interval = 500) {
  let attempts = 0;
  const poller = setInterval(() => {
    const data = get6senseData();
    if (data || attempts >= maxAttempts) {
      clearInterval(poller);
      callback(data);
    }
    attempts++;
  }, interval);
}

function setOptimizelyAttributes(attributes) {
  //console.log("attributes", attributes);
  window.optimizely = window.optimizely || [];
  window.optimizely.push({
    type: "user",
    attributes: attributes,
  });
}

pollFor6senseData((data) => {
  if (data) {
    try {
      setOptimizelyAttributes({
        "6sense_annual_revenue": (data.company && data.company.annual_revenue) || "unknown",
        "6sense_city": (data.company && data.company.city) || "unknown",
        "6sense_country": (data.company && data.company.country) || "unknown",
        "6sense_country_iso_code": (data.company && data.company.country_iso_code) || "unknown",
        "6sense_employee_count": (data.company && data.company.employee_count) || "unknown",
        "6sense_employee_range": (data.company && data.company.employee_range) || "unknown",
        "6sense_industry": (data.company && data.company.industry) || "unknown",
        "6sense_industry_v2": (data.company && data.company.industry_v2) || "unknown",
        "6sense_is_6qa": (data.company && data.company.is_6qa) || "unknown",
        "6sense_is_blacklisted": (data.company && data.company.is_blacklisted) || "unknown",
        "6sense_revenue_range": (data.company && data.company.revenue_range) || "unknown", "6sense_company_name": (data.company && data.company.name) || "unknown",
      });
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Error setting Optimizely attributes:", error);
    }
  }
});
